title: Minetorio
description:
Minetorio is a factorio inspired plugin which is all about automation!

With this plugin you can automate crafting, farming, mining, smelting, make chest sorters and so much more. There is over 40+ devices that can perform various tasks for automation!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Bg6bzq3jK94" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Test Server: MinetorioSMP.minehut.gg**

**Introduction!**
Minetorio is all about automation. Heavily inspired by Factorio this plugin aims to add a little bit of its charm into Minecraft. No other plugins are required and it is easy to install and configure with an in game config editor.

**Mechanics**
Here is a list of general Mechanics that Minetorio adds. Please understand this list is not fully inclusive, there is many many features in Minetorio, naming what they 100+ devices or machines do would take some time.

- Move items with conveyor belts & item teleporters, virtual trains and more!
- Automate most Minecraft tasks with devices. These devices can break blocks, mine a quarry, kill nearby animals, collect drops, shear sheep, milk cows, gather crops, plant crops and so so much more.
- You can automate general smelting, you would never need to hand feed a ton of furnaces, it could all be down automatically!
- A tech system that can be disabled, but it allows users to unlock devices and items as they progress!
- Pollution systems that slowly alter the world around your big factories, they can eventually create biter nests, which will seek out your factories to destory them! (Can be disabled of course, the biters and or pollution)
- Most Devices have complete custom skins, without the need for a resource pack and can be customized to a different skin or disabled entirely.
- A simple but complex power system to power your factory ranging from solar power, wind power, steam power all the way to nuclear power. There is MANY ways to power your factory!

**Configuation**
Minetorio is VERY configurable. You can disable entire features and completely change Minetorio to fit your server. It fits great with a classic SMP server, but also works well with RP and city servers due to the political dynamics that technology and pollution bring to the table.

Minetorio works out of the box! So to get started you can literally just slap it in your server and your good to go. Devices and items will have recipes added to the appropriate devices, which of course you change change at any time or even remove! The *out* of the box setup works best for SMP / survival servers. More complex servers will likely need to tinker with the config, which has well over 500+ options to configure.

**Why Minetorio**
You should download Minetorio if your looking for the following!
  - Automation
  - Tech mod like plugin
  - Like simple but complex systems

**Why Premium?**
The asking price for premium is cheap compared to what your getting! Im a single developer and I promise bug fixes and update to new minecraft versions! I have another premium resources i've kept up with for years! I feel its fair to ask for the work i've done and hopefully premium can allow me to save up to host events or take some time off to continue to develop the project further! You are getting a modded version of minecraft with this plugin but without your players needing to download a mod! Thats pretty awesome in my book!

Premium adds a few features! Here are some notable ones!
+ Entire new systems like space travel and space ships!
+ Over 100 additional devices and items.
+ Over nearly 200 config options for premium only
+ Access to features like the tech system!
Some important devices added by the premium version include the auto miner, the elevator, the teleporter, the deep drill which allows admins to make any item mineable from a virtual source, a 3x3 pickaxe!

This is the free version of Minetorio! But that doesnt mean it wont work or has barely any meat on its bones! Everything mentioned above the why premium section is something you can do in the free version! I have purposely left out premium only features! The premium version just adds more, the orignal content for Minetorio was completed a long time ago. But if you just want MORE minetorio then you can get it and its a way to support me!
